debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h (A : Set (S k)) (hA : ∀ s, s ∈ A ↔ linearInvo k s ∉ A) : 2 * Fintype.card A = Fintype.card (S k) := by
    rw [← Fintype.card_subtype_add_card_subtype_compl A, ← Fintype.card_congr (Equiv.ofInvolutive (linearInvo k) (linearInvo_sq k))]
    congr; ext s; exact hA s
  refine Nat.mul_left_cancel (by norm_num) ((h (T k) ?_).trans (h (U k) ?_).symm)
  · intro s; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩ := s; simp [T, linearInvo]
    have : z ≠ 0 := by intro hz; have := hS.1; simp [hz] at this; apply_fun (· % 4) at this; norm_num at this
    omega
  · intro s; obtain ⟨⟨x, y, z⟩, hS⟩ := s; simp [U, linearInvo]
    have : x - y + z ≠ 0 := by
      intro h; have h_sq : (x + y) ^ 2 = 4 * k + 1 := by rw [← hS.1, ← h]; ring
      exact (Fact.out : (4 * k + 1).Prime).not_isSquare ⟨x + y, h_sq⟩
